raw_consumer_statement: Salesman came to my house and I agreed to roof repairs. A deposit of {$5300.00} was made on XX/XX/year> to the company by credit card. The company made no attempts to perform the repairs until several months after my deposit, which was unsatisfactory to my expectations. They then tried to begin the repairs on XX/XX/XXXX, but by that time the repairs would be made too late.
